Content:
# suppress-eslint-errors

![Release](https://github.com/amanda-mitchell/suppress-eslint-errors/workflows/Release/badge.svg)

Have you ever tried to turn on a new eslint rule only to be discouraged by hundreds or thousands of errors in an existing codebase?
So have we.

Sometimes, there isn't a great business case for updating all of the existing (working!) code, especially in a larger, legacy codebase.
For those times, `suppress-eslint-errors` has you covered.

## How it works

`suppress-eslint-errors` is a codemod for [jscodeshift](https://github.com/facebook/jscodeshift) that runs eslint against your existing code.
For each eslint error it finds, it adds a little snippet:
Translation:
# suppress-eslint-errors

![Release](https://github.com/amanda-mitchell/suppress-eslint-errors/workflows/Release/badge.svg)

你是否曾尝试启用一个新的 eslint 规则，却被现有代码库中成百上千的错误吓退？
我们也是。

有时候，没有充分的业务理由去更新所有现有（且可用！）的代码，尤其是在较大的遗留代码库中。
在这种情况下，`suppress-eslint-errors` 可以帮助你。

## 工作原理

`suppress-eslint-errors` 是一个基于 [jscodeshift](https://github.com/facebook/jscodeshift) 的代码修改工具，它会针对你的现有代码运行 eslint。
对于它发现的每个 eslint 错误，它都会添加一段小代码片段：

RowTranslations.originContent: # suppress-eslint-errors
RowTranslations.translatedContent: # suppress-eslint-errors

RowTranslations.originContent: ![Release](https://github.com/amanda-mitchell/suppress-eslint-errors/workflows/Release/badge.svg)
RowTranslations.translatedContent: ![Release](https://github.com/amanda-mitchell/suppress-eslint-errors/workflows/Release/badge.svg)

RowTranslations.originContent: Have you ever tried to turn on a new eslint rule only to be discouraged by hundreds or thousands of errors in an existing codebase?
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 你是否曾尝试启用一个新的 eslint 规则，却被现有代码库中成百上千的错误吓退？

RowTranslations.originContent: So have we.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 我们也是。

RowTranslations.originContent: Sometimes, there isn't a great business case for updating all of the existing (working!) code, especially in a larger, legacy codebase.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 有时候，没有充分的业务理由去更新所有现有（且可用！）的代码，尤其是在较大的遗留代码库中。

RowTranslations.originContent: For those times, `suppress-eslint-errors` has you covered.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 在这种情况下，`suppress-eslint-errors` 可以帮助你。

RowTranslations.originContent: ## How it works
RowTranslations.translatedContent: ## 工作原理

RowTranslations.originContent: `suppress-eslint-errors` is a codemod for [jscodeshift](https://github.com/facebook/jscodeshift) that runs eslint against your existing code.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: `suppress-eslint-errors` 是一个基于 [jscodeshift](https://github.com/facebook/jscodeshift) 的代码修改工具，它会针对你的现有代码运行 eslint。

RowTranslations.originContent: For each eslint error it finds, it adds a little snippet:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 对于它发现的每个 eslint 错误，它都会添加一段小代码片段：

RowTranslations.originContent: ```javascript
RowTranslations.translatedContent: ```javascript

RowTranslations.originContent: // TODO: Fix this the next time the file is edited.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: // TODO: Fix this the next time the file is edited.

RowTranslations.originContent: // eslint-disable-next-line cool-new-rule
RowTranslations.translatedContent: // eslint-disable-next-line cool-new-rule

Content:
This way, you can get the benefits of the rule in new code without having to immediately work through a huge backlog.

## Usage

`suppress-eslint-errors` comes with a wrapper script so that you can call it directly without installing anything extra:
Translation:
这样，您可以在新代码中获得规则的好处，而无需立即处理大量积压问题。

## 用法

`suppress-eslint-errors` 配有一个包装脚本，您可以直接调用它，无需额外安装任何东西：

RowTranslations.translatedContent: 这样，您可以在新代码中获得规则的好处，而无需立即处理大量积压问题。

RowTranslations.originContent: This way, you can get the benefits of the rule in new code without having to immediately work through a huge backlog.

RowTranslations.translatedContent: ## 用法

RowTranslations.originContent: ## Usage

RowTranslations.translatedContent: `suppress-eslint-errors` 配有一个包装脚本，您可以直接调用它，无需额外安装任何东西：

RowTranslations.originContent: `suppress-eslint-errors` comes with a wrapper script so that you can call it directly without installing anything extra:
```bash
RowTranslations.translatedContent: ```bash

RowTranslations.originContent: npx suppress-eslint-errors [jscodeshift options] PATH...
RowTranslations.translatedContent: npx suppress-eslint-errors [jscodeshift options] PATH...

Content:
The wrapper will call `jscodeshift` with the transformer and any other arguments that you pass to it.
If it detects a `.gitignore` in the local directory, it will also specify that as the `--ignore-config`.

`suppress-eslint-errors` must be used with a locally installed copy of `eslint`.
If it can't find one, it will bail out early.

_NOTE:_ `jscodeshift` has some bugs with respect to how it handles `.gitignore` files that sometimes causes it to ignore all files.
If this tool detects that your `.gitignore` contains problematic patterns, the `--ignore-config` option will be skipped.

In some cases, the code produced by this codemod will make some unfortunate indentation decisions.
Be sure to re-run any code formatting tools you use before committing!

## Options

**--message**: Sets the comment to add above eslint-disable-next-line comments.

**--rules**: Comma-separated list of ESLint rule IDs to disable. When specified, violations of rules not in this set will be left in place.

## Examples

Suppress all errors in the `index.js` file, using a custom comment:
Translation:
包装器将使用转换器和您传递的任何其他参数调用 `jscodeshift`。  
如果它检测到本地目录中有 `.gitignore`，它也会将其指定为 `--ignore-config`。  

`suppress-eslint-errors` 必须与本地安装的 `eslint` 一起使用。  
如果找不到本地安装的 `eslint`，它将提前退出。  

_注意：_ `jscodeshift` 在处理 `.gitignore` 文件时存在一些错误，有时会导致忽略所有文件。  
如果此工具检测到您的 `.gitignore` 包含有问题的模式，将跳过 `--ignore-config` 选项。  

在某些情况下，此代码修改工具生成的代码在缩进方面可能做出一些不理想的决定。  
请确保在提交前重新运行您使用的任何代码格式化工具！  

## 选项  

**--message**：设置添加在 eslint-disable-next-line 注释上方的注释内容。  

**--rules**：用逗号分隔的 ESLint 规则 ID 列表，用于禁用这些规则。指定此选项时，不在此列表中的规则违规将保留不变。  

## 示例  

使用自定义注释，在 `index.js` 文件中抑制所有错误：

RowTranslations.originContent: If it detects a `.gitignore` in the local directory, it will also specify that as the `--ignore-config`.

RowTranslations.translatedContent: 如果找不到本地安装的 `eslint`，它将提前退出。

RowTranslations.originContent: _NOTE:_ `jscodeshift` has some bugs with respect to how it handles `.gitignore` files that sometimes causes it to ignore all files.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 如果此工具检测到您的 `.gitignore` 包含有问题的模式，将跳过 `--ignore-config` 选项。

RowTranslations.originContent: If this tool detects that your `.gitignore` contains problematic patterns, the `--ignore-config` option will be skipped.

RowTranslations.translatedContent: 在某些情况下，此代码修改工具生成的代码在缩进方面可能做出一些不理想的决定。

RowTranslations.originContent: In some cases, the code produced by this codemod will make some unfortunate indentation decisions.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 请确保在提交前重新运行您使用的任何代码格式化工具！

RowTranslations.originContent: Be sure to re-run any code formatting tools you use before committing!

RowTranslations.originContent: ## Options

RowTranslations.translatedContent: **--message**：设置添加在 eslint-disable-next-line 注释上方的注释内容。

RowTranslations.originContent: **--message**: Sets the comment to add above eslint-disable-next-line comments.

RowTranslations.translatedContent: **--rules**：用逗号分隔的 ESLint 规则 ID 列表，用于禁用这些规则。指定此选项时，不在此列表中的规则违规将保留不变。

RowTranslations.originContent: **--rules**: Comma-separated list of ESLint rule IDs to disable. When specified, violations of rules not in this set will be left in place.

RowTranslations.translatedContent: ## 示例

RowTranslations.originContent: ## Examples

RowTranslations.translatedContent: 使用自定义注释，在 `index.js` 文件中抑制所有错误：

RowTranslations.originContent: Suppress all errors in the `index.js` file, using a custom comment:
```bash
RowTranslations.translatedContent: ```bash

RowTranslations.originContent: npx suppress-eslint-errors ./index.js --message="TODO: Issue #123"
RowTranslations.translatedContent: npx suppress-eslint-errors ./index.js --message="TODO: Issue #123"

Content: Suppress violations of the `eqeqeq` and `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` rules in .ts and .tsx files in the `src` directory:
Translation: 在 `src` 目录中的 .ts 和 .tsx 文件中，抑制 `eqeqeq` 和 `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` 规则的违规行为：

RowTranslations.originContent: Suppress violations of the `eqeqeq` and `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` rules in .ts and .tsx files in the `src` directory:
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 在 `src` 目录中的 .ts 和 .tsx 文件中，抑制 `eqeqeq` 和 `@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any` 规则的违规行为：

RowTranslations.originContent: ```bash
RowTranslations.translatedContent: ```bash

RowTranslations.originContent: npx suppress-eslint-errors ./src --extensions=ts,tsx --parser=tsx --rules=eqeqeq,@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
RowTranslations.translatedContent: npx suppress-eslint-errors ./src --extensions=ts,tsx --parser=tsx --rules=eqeqeq,@typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any

Content:
## Nuances

Like the name of the tool says, this only suppresses eslint _errors_.
If you have warnings that you'd like to suppress, change your eslint config to turn them into errors before running the tool or specify the rules using the `--rules` flag.

## Is it perfect?

Definitely not. PRs are welcome for any edge cases that you encounter.
Translation:
## 细微差别

正如工具名称所示，它仅抑制 eslint 的 _错误_。
如果你有想要抑制的警告，请在运行工具之前修改你的 eslint 配置，将警告转换为错误，或者使用 `--rules` 标志指定规则。

## 它完美吗？

绝对不是。如果你遇到任何边缘情况，欢迎提交 PR。

RowTranslations.originContent: ## Nuances
RowTranslations.translatedContent: ## 细微差别

RowTranslations.originContent: Like the name of the tool says, this only suppresses eslint _errors_.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 正如工具名称所示，它仅抑制 eslint 的 _错误_。

RowTranslations.originContent: If you have warnings that you'd like to suppress, change your eslint config to turn them into errors before running the tool or specify the rules using the `--rules` flag.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 如果你有想要抑制的警告，请在运行工具之前修改你的 eslint 配置，将警告转换为错误，或者使用 `--rules` 标志指定规则。

RowTranslations.originContent: ## Is it perfect?
RowTranslations.translatedContent: ## 它完美吗？

RowTranslations.originContent: Definitely not. PRs are welcome for any edge cases that you encounter.
RowTranslations.translatedContent: 绝对不是。如果你遇到任何边缘情况，欢迎提交 PR。
